name: Beverly Setzer
bio: Beverly Setzer holds degrees in clarinet performance from the University of Washington where she studied with William McColl and William O. Smith. She is Principal Clarinet of Bellevue and Cascade Symphonies and is a member of Symphony Tacoma, Lake Washington Symphony, Seattle Bass Clarinet Project, the Bavarian Village Band, Roadside Attraction, Banda Vagos and the Mellifluous Zephyrs, and served as Principal Clarinet of La Filarmónica del Bajío in Guanajuato, Mexico. She enjoys playing a wide variety of music ranging from classical to polkas to jazz.
